name: Eastleigh West
description: Chandler''s Ford & Hiltingbury are mainly residential areas, but have local amenities enjoyed by local residents. These include grocery shops, hairdressers, doctors surgeries, dentists and even a large craft store. There is a large recreation ground with The Hilt Pavilion offering services to the local community. The Loft youth club is run from here and is popular with local young people. The recreation ground is popular with children young and old, dog walkers and local people out to enjoy the area. Fryern Pavilion also offers its use to the local community.
